transcript: Yeah, I needed to, uh... process some squid meat.
Well, how about I bring it down tomorrow?
Uh, don't do squid. No, they don't do squid.
Because I see the product that they put together, it's all cat food and dog food.
Well, that's what it's for, a dog.
It's a new flavor. I invented it.
[laughing] Okay... well, you'll have to come down and see, uh, Kenny tomorrow, then.
Uh, you're gonna be seein'... somethin' else... once I show up down there.
[laughing] Who in the hell is this?
Want me whoop you in the ass, or what?
[laughs] I haven't heard that name in... [laughing] ...in like, fifty years. That's good!
Ready to get choppin', or what?
[laughs] Yeah, come on down, talk to Ron.
You're gonna be talkin' to a... four hundred and forty pound squid here in a second.
I'm gonna whoop ya in the ass.
[laughs] Except I know better! [laughs] Though, seriously, who is this?
You ever see squid blubber before?
Uh, I've seen squid on a, uh, dinner table.
Well, help me out! You ever have tentacle meat?
No... [laughs] No. No, I wouldn't even touch the squid, I saw it on a plate and that was it. In all seriousness, our guys do lamb and pork. That's all we do.
Well, how much for some of that aqualamb, then?
Ready to rub a little lamb, or what?
[laughing] No... [laughs] Uh, I'll tell ya what. Yeah, come on down.
